steps.title: Express 74% of the height algebraically
steps.content: When we say the base is 74% of the height, this means base = 74% $\times$ $h$. We need to convert the percentage to decimal form.

steps.title: Convert percentage to decimal
steps.content:
$$74\% = \frac{74}{100} = 0.74$$
Therefore, the base length is $0.74h$. That confirms D is correct.
